profile: Software Engineer focused on transaction-critical systems in core banking. I build and maintain high-reliability flows on IBM z/OS while integrating legacy infrastructure with modern service layers. My approach is shaped by system ownership, operational accountability and performance under load.

highlights: Developed and maintained transaction-critical systems handling high-volume financial flows on IBM z/OS.
Implemented and evolved COBOL and HLASM transaction logic in business-critical core banking domains with strict correctness requirements.
Drove integration between mainframe execution paths and distributed service layers to improve reliability and operational traceability.
Contributed to resilience and performance work for systems operating under sustained production load.
Delivered backend components for core financial processes with focus on stability, recoverability and predictable runtime behavior.
Supported cross-system integration and incident-sensitive operations across Linux and distributed service environments.
Worked close to production realities where system correctness and continuity directly affected financial operations.
Built service APIs and infrastructure for data-intensive product flows with emphasis on reliability and clean service contracts.
Implemented deployment patterns in AWS and improved delivery confidence for a fast-moving product team.
Owned integration points between analysis pipelines and customer-facing services under changing load patterns.
Developed service-backed applications with SQL data models and integration-heavy workflows.
Maintained Linux-hosted solutions with focus on durability, maintainability and production clarity.
Led operations in high-accountability environments where uptime, ownership and execution quality were non-negotiable.
Built decision discipline and resilience practices that now inform system design and delivery in software engineering.
Managed teams and outcomes with long-term stability as a primary success metric.

projects.name: Portfolio & Resume Presentation
projects.description: A focused profile experience designed to communicate engineering impact in high-reliability and transaction-critical contexts.
